title: International Registered Students

International Registered Students

Okan Homepage

Campus Life

Transportation

Shuttles

MENU

The main campus of Istabul Okan University is located in Akfırat-Tuzla district, in the Asian part of Istanbul. Campus is 10 minutes away from Sabiha Gökçen Airport.

Altough Istanbul Okan University is relativeley far from the city center, it seeks to provide efficient and convenient shuttle transportation for students.

You can see the shuttle services which is listed below;

Transportation by Shuttle

In front of Uydukent Migros

Gebze
